HugsLib.UpdateFeatureDef.content: Since the mod Multi Verb Combat Framework has been absorbed into the Vanilla Expanded Framework this mod has now changed as well. You now need the Vanilla Expanded Framework for the mounted weapons to work as they should. Sorry for any inconvenience but this change is out of my control.

Due to a bad interaction with the developer of the HAR framework combined with the increased work required I have decided to not further update this mod. It will stay up to support the previous versions of the game.
